wordplay_note: A brown warrior — embattled and weary
card_description: Ian Duncan (meaning "Duncan = brown warrior") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Simulacra*. Psychokinetic jug player who becomes entangled in the regime's power struggles. Name note: A brown warrior — embattled and weary. Art and telekinetic talent as political currency. First appears in *The Simulacra*.

reference.brief: Psychokinetic jug player who becomes entangled in the regime's power struggles
reference.significance: Art and telekinetic talent as political currency
